name: Chili ( Spicy Pork )
recipeIngredient: 1 can Beans; kidney, drained and rinsed -- 16 oz. can
recipeInstructions:
1. In a Dutch oven, brown pork and onions until pork is no longer pink. Drain.
2. Stir in garlic, peppers, and celery. Cook for 5 minutes.
3. Add remaining ingredients; bring to a boil.
4. Reduce heat, cover, and simmer for 45 minutes.
Makes about 2 1/2 quarts.
